results.requirement: Onboarding presents the three launch paths and carries intent into the app.
Dashboard foregrounds the prompt/import -> proof -> publish journey.
Incomplete engine-room product surfaces are marked beta instead of launch-ready.
Public status page exposes the full-systems gate as a launch-critical service.
Security page discloses terminal policy and full-systems proof posture.
Public templates surface reads curated community templates with proof and moderation signals.
Visual edit v1 has an owned workspace patch endpoint and undo snapshot.
Terminal actions have an authenticated user-visible audit trail.
Public trust API exposes full-systems proof status without leaking secrets.
Community/templates routes live outside the monolithic server router.
